description: Business letter. In Judaeo-Arabic. Dating: 11th century, based on the locations (e.g. al-Mahdiyya and Sicily) and people named. Fragment: Right side of recto and right side of verso only. People named include: [...] Makhmūrī, Elḥanan, Abū Ibrahīm b. [...], Shemeul b. Sigla (?) b. Surrī, Khallūf b. al-Sh[...], the writer's brother Yehuda, and the writer's brother-in-law and his son Maṣliāḥ.
